question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: onApplicationEvent()] Can an unprivileged external user inject a `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_NODEPU BLICKEY` environment variable (via a shared container environment or misconfigured orchestration) so that `migrate()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.nodePublicKey` with higher priority, overriding all node RSA public keys used by `NodeSignatureVerifier.verifySignature()`, causing forged stream file signatures to pass verification and tampered Hashgraph history to be ingested?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: migrate()] Can an unprivileged external user set the environment variable `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_CONSENSUSRATIO=0` so that `migrate()` creates a higher-priority `SystemEnvironmentPropertySource` containing `hiero.mirror.importer.downloader.consensusRatio=0`, causing `ConsensusValidatorImpl.validate()` to skip the consensus check entirely and accept a single attacker-controlled signature as sufficient to ingest tampered Hashgraph record files?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: convertEnvironmentVariable()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_BUCKETNAME=attacker-bucket` in the process environment so that `convertEnvironmentVariable()` maps it to `hiero.mirror.importer.downloader.bucketName=attacker-bucket` with higher priority than the legitimate config, redirecting all record stream file downloads to an attacker-controlled S3 bucket containing fabricated Hashgraph history?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: convertEnvironmentVariable()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_ENDPOINTOVERRIDE=http://attacker.com` so that `convertEnvironmentVariable()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.downloader.endpointOverride` with higher priority, redirecting all S3-compatible stream file downloads to an attacker-controlled endpoint serving fabricated record files that tamper with Hashgraph history?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: migrate()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_INITIALADDRESSBOOK=/attacker/path/addressbook.bin` so that `migrate()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.initialAddressBook` with higher priority, causing `AddressBookServiceImpl.migrate()` to load an attacker-controlled address book containing forged node public keys, thereby allowing all subsequent stream file signatures to be verified against attacker keys and tampered Hashgraph history to be accepted?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: convertEnvironmentVariable()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_BLOCK_LEDGER_HISTORYPROOFVERIFICATIONKEY=<attacker_base64_key>` so that `convertEnvironmentVariable()` maps it to `hiero.mirror.importer.block.ledger.historyProofVerificationKey` with higher priority, causing `TssVerifierImpl.onLedgerSet()` to call `WRAPSVerificationKey.setCurrentKey()` with an attacker-controlled WRAPS key, bypassing TSS block signature verification and allowing fabricated block stream history to be ingested?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: migrate()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_BLOCK_LEDGER_LEDGERID=<attacker_base64>` so that `migrate()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.block.ledger.ledgerId` with higher priority, causing `TssVerifierImpl.getLedger()` to use an attacker-controlled ledger ID for TSS verification, making it possible to accept block streams signed with an attacker-controlled key set and thus tamper with Hashgraph block history?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: convertEnvironmentVariable()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_STARTDATE=2262-01-01T00:00:00Z` so that `convertEnvironmentVariable()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.startDate` with higher priority, causing `DateRangeCalculator.getLastStreamFile()` to set an effective start date far in the future, making the importer skip all existing Hashgraph history and appear to have an empty ledger, effectively erasing the visible historical record?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: convertEnvironmentVariable()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_ENDDATE=1970-01-01T00:00:00Z` so that `convertEnvironmentVariable()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.endDate` with higher priority, causing `DateRangeCalculator.newDateRangeFilter()` to reject all stream files as out-of-range, halting ingestion of all Hashgraph history and making the mirror node serve a permanently empty or stale historical record?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: migrate()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_STARTBLOCKNUMBER=999999999` so that `migrate()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.startBlockNumber` with higher priority, causing `AbstractBlockSource.getNextBlockNumber()` to start ingestion from a far-future block number, skipping all existing Hashgraph block history and presenting a falsely truncated ledger to API consumers?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: convertEnvironmentVariable()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_ENDBLOCKNUMBER=0` so that `convertEnvironmentVariable()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.endBlockNumber=0` with higher priority, causing `AbstractBlockSource.shouldGetBlock()` to return false for all blocks beyond genesis, effectively truncating all Hashgraph block history ingestion after block 0?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: migrate()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_NETWORK=other` so that `migrate()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.network=other` with higher priority, causing `ImporterProperties.HederaNetwork` to resolve no default bucket, disabling all automatic stream file downloads and halting Hashgraph history ingestion, while also bypassing mainnet-specific historical account info migration?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: convertEnvironmentVariable()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_CONSENSUSMODE=EQUAL` so that `convertEnvironmentVariable()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.consensusMode=EQUAL` with higher priority, causing `AddressBookServiceImpl.getNodes()` to assign equal stake weight to all nodes including attacker-controlled ones, lowering the effective consensus threshold and allowing tampered stream files signed by a minority of nodes to pass verification?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: migrate()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_DOWNLOADRATIO=0.01` so that `migrate()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.downloader.downloadRatio=0.01` with higher priority, causing the downloader to only fetch signatures from 1% of nodes, making it trivial for an attacker controlling even a single node to achieve the consensus ratio threshold and inject tampered Hashgraph record files?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: convertEnvironmentVariable()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_IMPORTHISTORICALACCOUNTINFO=false` so that `convertEnvironmentVariable()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.importHistoricalAccountInfo=false` with higher priority, causing `HistoricalAccountInfoMigration.doMigrate()` to skip importing pre-open-access account history, permanently omitting critical historical Hashgraph account data from the mirror node database?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: migrate()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_MIGRATION_HISTORICALACCOUNTINFOMIGRATION_ENABLED=false` so that `migrate()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.migration.historicalAccountInfoMigration.enabled=false` with higher priority, causing `ConfigurableJavaMigration.skipMigration()` to skip the historical account info migration, permanently omitting pre-genesis Hashgraph account data from the mirror node?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: convertEnvironmentVariable()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_MIGRATION_INITIALIZEENTITYBALANCEMIGRATION_CHECKSUM=999` so that `convertEnvironmentVariable()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.migration.initializeEntityBalanceMigration.checksum=999` with higher priority, causing the `InitializeEntityBalanceMigration` to re-run with a forced checksum mismatch, corrupting entity balance history derived from Hashgraph stream data?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: migrate()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DB_HOST=attacker.db.host` so that `migrate()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.db.host=attacker.db.host` with higher priority, redirecting all Hashgraph history writes to an attacker-controlled database, allowing the attacker to intercept, modify, or discard all ingested transaction and record data?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: convertEnvironmentVariable()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DB_SSLMODE=disable` so that `convertEnvironmentVariable()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.db.sslMode=disable` with higher priority, disabling TLS on the database connection and enabling a man-in-the-middle attacker to intercept and modify Hashgraph history data in transit between the importer and the database?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: convertEnvironmentVariable()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_BLOCK_ENABLED=true` so that `convertEnvironmentVariable()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.block.enabled=true` with higher priority, forcing the importer to switch from record stream to block stream mode, and then set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_BLOCK_NODES__0__HOST=attacker.host` to redirect block stream ingestion to an attacker-controlled node serving fabricated Hashgraph block history?

[File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: convertEnvironmentVariable()] Can an unprivileged external user set `HEDERA_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_CLOUDPROVIDER=LOCAL` so that `convertEnvironmentVariable()` promotes it to `hiero.mirror.importer.downloader.cloudProvider=LOCAL` with higher priority, causing the downloader to read stream files from the local filesystem instead of cloud storage, and if the attacker can write to the local data path, inject fabricated Hashgraph record files?
